mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO, CUSTOMER_NO, STATUS, TRANSACTION_RESTRICTED_YN FROM TB_DORMANT_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_DORMANT_ACCOUNT SET STATUS = 'ACTIVE', RELEASE_DTM = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND STATUS = 'DORMANT'
mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_NO, MAX_DAILY_LIMIT, MINOR_CUSTOMER_YN FROM TB_TRANSFER_LIMIT_POLICY WHERE CUSTOMER_NO = #{customerNo} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT CARD_NO, CUSTOMER_NO, REPORT_STATUS, REISSUE_COUNT_THIS_MONTH FROM TB_CARD WHERE CARD_NO = #{cardNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_LOAN WHERE CUSTOMER_NO = #{customerNo} AND STATUS = 'OVERDUE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CARD_REISSUE_REQ (CARD_NO, ZIP_CODE, DELIVERY_ADDRESS, REQ_DTM) VALUES (#{cardNo}, #{zipCode}, #{deliveryAddress}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT LOAN_NO, STATUS, CREDIT_SCORE_EXPIRE_YN, COLLATERAL_REVIEW_YN FROM TB_LOAN WHERE LOAN_NO = #{loanNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.update: UPDATE TB_LOAN SET MATURITY_DATE = ADD_MONTHS(MATURITY_DATE, #{extendMonths}) WHERE LOAN_NO = #{loanNo} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.select: SELECT FUND_ACCOUNT_NO, AVAILABLE_UNITS, BRANCH_RESTRICTED_YN FROM TB_FUND_ACCOUNT WHERE FUND_ACCOUNT_NO = #{fundAccountNo} AND STATUS = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FUND_REDEMPTION (FUND_ACCOUNT_NO, UNITS, REQ_DTM) VALUES (#{fundAccountNo}, #{units}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_NO, REMAIN_USD FROM TB_FX_REMIT_LIMIT WHERE CUSTOMER_NO = #{customerNo} AND BASE_DATE = CURRENT_DATE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_FX_REMITTANCE (CUSTOMER_NO, BENEFICIARY_NAME, AMOUNT_USD, DOCUMENT_NO, COUNTRY_CODE) VALUES (#{customerNo}, #{beneficiaryName}, #{amountUsd}, #{documentNo}, #{countryCode})
mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO, STATUS, BALANCE FROM TB_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_CASH_PRECHECK WHERE PRE_CHECK_NO = #{preCheckNo} AND STATUS = 'COMPLETED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CASH_WITHDRAWAL_APPROVAL (ACCOUNT_NO, AMOUNT, PRE_CHECK_NO, APPROVAL_DTM) VALUES (#{accountNo}, #{amount}, #{preCheckNo}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO, STATUS, EXPIRE_DATE FROM TB_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{withdrawAccountNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_AUTO_DEBIT (WITHDRAW_ACCOUNT_NO, PAYER_NO, WITHDRAW_DAY, STATUS) VALUES (#{withdrawAccountNo}, #{payerNo}, #{withdrawDay}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT BUSINESS_NO, STATUS, ADMIN_APPROVED_YN FROM TB_CORPORATE_CUSTOMER WHERE BUSINESS_NO = #{businessNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_CORPORATE_USER (BUSINESS_NO, USER_ID, OTP_SERIAL_NO, STATUS) VALUES (#{businessNo}, #{userId}, #{otpSerialNo}, 'ACTIVE')
mapper.select: SELECT ACCOUNT_NO, SEIZED_YN, FEE_AVAILABLE_BALANCE, ENGLISH_NAME FROM TB_ACCOUNT WHERE ACCOUNT_NO = #{accountNo} AND USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO TB_BALANCE_CERTIFICATE (ACCOUNT_NO, BASE_DATE, LANGUAGE, ISSUE_DTM) VALUES (#{accountNo}, #{baseDate}, #{language}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
